name: io.github.shadoprizm/cyberlens-mcp-server
title: CyberLens
description: Security scanning for websites, public repositories, and Open CLAW skills.

environmentVariables.name: CYBERLENS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: CyberLens API key. Optional if you use the connect_account browser flow.

environmentVariables.name: CYBERLENS_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the CyberLens public scan API base URL.
